code:
class Node:
    def __init__(self, data):
        self.data = data
        self.next = None

class LinkedList:
    def __init__(self):
        self.head = None

    def add_to_beginning(self, data):
        new_node = Node(data)
        new_node.next = self.head
        self.head = new_node

    def display(self):
        current = self.head
        elements = []
        while current:
            elements.append(current.data)
            current = current.next
        print(" -> ".join(map(str, elements)))

if __name__ == "__main__":
    my_list = LinkedList()
    print("Boş liste:")
    my_list.display()

    my_list.add_to_beginning(30)
    print("30 eklendi (başa):")
    my_list.display()

    my_list.add_to_beginning(20)
    print("20 eklendi (başa):")
    my_list.display()

    my_list.add_to_beginning(10)
    print("10 eklendi (başa):")
    my_list.display()

    my_list.add_to_beginning(5)
    print("5 eklendi (başa):")
    my_list.display()
prompt: Linked list'e başa eleman ekleme fonksiyonu yaz.
